content.description: The generated questionnaire in a base64 encoded format.

createdAt.description: The date the questionnaire was created, in ISO 8601 extended format. For example, 2022-12-18T10:15:30+01:00

id.description: The unique identifier of the signed questionnaire.

validUntil.description: The expiration date of the questionnaire, in ISO 8601 extended format. For example, 2022-12-18T10:15:30+01:00
